content.text: 1:00 a.m. Encrypted folder.

Han Yuchu hasn't opened this folder for a long time. The last time was November - the night she discovered the connection between the accident and the DT-03 incident. She then locked it and continued to be a "guest" in the base.
But tonight she turned it on again.

The cause was a small incident during the day. 1547 and 1548 were discussing the parameter adjustment of a communication system in the work area. Han Yuchu was sitting not far away and could hear sporadic conversations. Mostly technical terms. But there is one sentence——
The redundant coverage of DT-01 can be supplemented from here. But that hole in the DT-03...
She did not finish. She paused, glanced at 1548, changed her wording, and continued the discussion.
That pause. That look. Han Yuchu caught it.
She retrieved all the information on the DT-03 incident. Not much is disclosed, but for an information analyst, not much is enough - key information is often hidden between the lines.

Event summary: On September 14, 2022, DT-03 Feedscatter field was interfered with. 1549 encountered an attack while performing routine maintenance, and consciousness data began to leak. 1548 arrived at the scene and performed L3 direct connection - full bandwidth unprotected access. Safe upper limit is 4 to 6 seconds.
It took her 58 seconds.
1549's consciousness data was completely extracted. Completeness rate 99.97%.
The price is 1548 irreversible damage to the color vision module. Permanent total color blindness.
Han Yuchu leaned back on the chair.

58 seconds.

Nearly ten times the safe upper limit.
There is no record in the public record of who paid the price. But Han Yuchu had done enough data crossovers.

1548's behavior pattern - she never comments on color and always refers to brightness and contrast when discussing vision-related topics. Once in the base, 2275 said that the color scheme of a certain design draft was very nice, and 1548 walked by without saying a word.
There are 1547 more. One time she accidentally said, "Gray is good" - her tone seemed to be repeating what others had said, with something akin to distress that she rarely showed.
Han Yuchu spelled it out.
Two o'clock in the morning. There were footsteps in the corridor.
1548 came back from patrol. As she passed the work area, she saw Han Yuchu still there.
The two people looked at each other.
It's you again.
It's you again.
1548 leaned against the doorframe. I haven't taken off my coat yet, and there is mud on my boots. Returning from patrol late at night.
Han Yuchu looked at her. Her gaze changed - I don't know when, the way she looked at 1548 no longer looked like a scanner, but more like a person looking at another person.
I have a question. Not the kind of question that is investigated.
oh?
Something about DT-03. Why don't you practice it?
It was quiet for a few seconds.

1548's expression did not change. But her body tensed slightly - the instinctive reaction of an android who has received combat training when encountering unexpected stimuli. Very slightly. Han Yuchu saw it.
You checked it out.
Not a question.
Crossover analysis. Not difficult.
Then what? Ready to write it into a report? "Android 1548 suffered irreversible sensory impairment due to rescue actions." Great data point.
Han Yuchu was not hurt by these words. She just looked at 1548, waiting for her to finish.
After speaking, 1548 fell silent. Han Yuchu's reaction was not what she expected: no embarrassment, no apology, none of the shyness humans often show when touching sensitive topics.
Don't write. This is not what the report is about.
Then why do you ask?
Han Yuchu thought for a while.
Because of the incident I'm tracking, the technical source is tied to the DT-03 incident. In a sense... what you lost is on the same chain as what I investigated.

1548 looked at her for a long time. In a gray world, Han Yuchu's outline is a shape composed of different depths of gray - dark hair, light skin, and medium-colored clothes. No color. But 1548 has become accustomed to using grayscale to identify people.
Those guys took technology away from the DT-03. And then screwed up.
Judging from the current data, yes.
1548 looked down at her hands. In gray vision, a faint light showed at the finger joints - traces of Fluid Titanium circulating under the skin. She could not see blue. But she knew it was blue.
Some scars don't need to heal. They become armor.
After saying that, she straightened up and prepared to leave. She paused for a moment when she passed Han Yuchu's workstation.
Don't be too late. You humans need to sleep.
Then she left. The sound of boots on the hallway floor faded away.
Han Yuchu stayed seated where she was.
She looked at the encrypted folder open on the screen. All the analysis, all the links, all the data pointing to the truth - it's all there.
She didn't record tonight's conversation.
This is the first time.
